mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates compress equity discount rates and lower corporate borrowing costs, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sudden month-over-month increase in the unemployment rate signals rapid labor market deterioration and impending economic contraction, triggering immediate equity sell-offs.
failure_condition: Positive 20-day forward returns occur in more than 55% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand growth, driving corporate earnings revisions and sustained equity appreciation.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields negative alpha relative to a single-series baseline over 60 trading days.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production operating above the historical baseline indicates strong manufacturing capacity utilization and robust supply-side momentum, generating short-term equity upside.
failure_condition: Signal predictive power vanishes with Rank IC below zero when federal funds rate exceeds 2.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation erodes real corporate profit margins and forces markets to price in aggressive central bank tightening, causing immediate equity drawdowns.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in more than 60% of high-inflation trigger months.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm employment combined with a declining unemployment rate confirms robust labor market absorption, supporting consumer spending and equity valuations.
failure_condition: Interaction term shows no incremental predictive value over PAYEMS alone in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly real GDP growth exceeding the long-term trend pace reflects sustained aggregate demand expansion, translating directly into higher corporate revenues and positive equity returns.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show zero correlation with GDPC1 growth rate with Spearman rho below 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp month-over-month contraction in industrial output indicates severe supply-side disruption or sudden demand collapse, prompting rapid risk-off positioning in equities.
failure_condition: Market fails to price in the contraction, yielding positive 5-day returns in more than 50% of instances.
